benefits.description: Body recomposition at higher body fats - gained 10 lbs of muscle while cutting from 285 to 225

protocol_notes: Ran both retatrutide and tirzepatide paired with HGH. Prefers tirzepatide + HGH pairing over retatrutide + HGH. Notes retatrutide's glucagon activity increases fasting blood glucose, which is not beneficial when GHH is in the mix. States retatrutide may be superior as first GLP or during bulk when actively pushing food intake. Observed that users switching from tirzepatide to retatrutide for weight loss end up stacking more tirzepatide. Emphasizes strict diet/caloric deficit as prime driver. Got hormonal panel work on wife before proceeding with peptide protocols.
